name: Scott Fitzgerald
subject: Unity?? About that...
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Scott Fitzgerald for Congress
body:
Biden's pettiness – and Evers' incompetence – threaten COVID recovery
Biden's pettiness - and Evers' incompetence - threaten COVID recovery No images? [Click here](https://scottfitzgerald.cmail20.com/t/t-e-mlhiktk-ahkdjtlkr-h/) [](https://scottfitzgerald.cmail20.com/t/t-l-mlhiktk-ahkdjtlkr-r/) PeterJoe Biden and his liberal friends are talking a lot about unity these days.But they're using "unity" as an excuse to take America in a dangerous direction. I'm going to continue to **stand tall for the people of Wisconsin** and **fight for our priorities** , instead of _caving to the left!_ [Stand Tall - Join Fitz](https://scottfitzgerald.cmail20.com/t/t-l-mlhiktk-ahkdjtlkr-y/) Just look at the Democrats' actions on COVID, and you'll see all you need to see. Instead of picking up where the Trump Administration left off, Biden's team is canceling the phrase "Operation Warp Speed" and lying about the rollout to erase Trump's name. Unlike the hypocrites on the left, I am **grateful** for what that President Trump and his administration have done for our country.Here in Wisconsin, Governor Evers is ducking responsibility for one of the weakest vaccine rollouts in the Midwest... _what will he do, now that he doesn't have Trump to blame?_**_I'm going to continue to hold this administration accountable, and keep our focus on America's priorities: reopening businesses, reopening schools, and continuing our progress on the vaccine._** That's the kind of unity Wisconsin wants.\- Congressman Scott FitzgeraldP.S. If you want to stand tall with me, [click here to support my campaign and join the fight in Washington](https://scottfitzgerald.cmail20.com/t/t-l-mlhiktk-ahkdjtlkr-j/)!

• Scott Fitzgerald will fight to help our economy recover

body:
| | | | |
---

**DEMOCRAT GOVS DON 'T FOLLOW THEIR OWN RULES!**

They will spare no expense targeting this seat -- spending millions on ads, investing in infrastructure to knock on every last door in the district, leaving no stone unturned to reach the handful of on-the-fence voters who will decide this election.

[**Can you chip in before Sunday 's midnight deadline to keep us on the path to victory?**](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001vnkJOPo4_-LxZalxAQXQq2y8bDPfXqlA8XmeCVOPJDszio9UnmAn1FrD6MVWfu3p2djhF8b3E5ZkfmoMSRf3_cb_vfMzMQWheK0uVIivJacm0kDYisMS5FSfvY6tZ9Bp3tDk2fz1cUMowMFkOKNnBuReZCsnaeaRzqRaVZhCf0CbLVcO3Q2v2ahczacx4ZzWyGNJmFyUf6LmU1uCKakveqdnYCuFF9b00FKiCaC2M61YRg155p9cb6evxnBmXu_96SRmtHl46HQub3sTno0M1FZo-ocemsFuJDPSOvIzhWZuCYZk1E8Bvh6yAJ-4m1mFM8I7DyCCFc_6ewH3giKm6hpztnz5pgTT95gipQShko3CxjStpn8qHv_Ow7jjU-qCzbvQNbJJL3Uj1yt-gPRc0wciM-JS0HS_xJHMmuI-SyI6JgSkkMDZDpUaOi1q2TMTD2TpQGi4QNw=&c=ijvfhlsnDQTNBbBPi6lF5dUZ11cVOKrGRGMOsf7nHxNwTfIbZGsJbg==&ch=JGc4nNsKRyt63dF36ZqScjPsFTvpfYsNLo1ejY_k6yAtQTZU7gV1JA==) What we do now goes a long way to determining the outcome of this top-targeted race.

Defending this seat won't be easy, but it's 100% necessary. From fighting for lower taxes to responsible government spending to affordable healthcare; from advocating for public safety and low tuition rates; from championing survivors of domestic violence and homeless veterans and children; Young is fighting for a better, brighter future for all.

**But she can 't do it alone. clean_body: We have just 4 days until the end of January. Giving us just 4 days to reach our first end of month fundraising goal of 2021 and only 4 days to prove to the Democrats, we are here to stay. ** . == We have just 4 days until the end of January, Friend. Giving us just 4 days to reach our first end of month fundraising goal of 2021 and only 4 days to prove to the Democrats, we are here to stay. == | == 200% Match Live Until 11:59 PM Tonight Our opponent -- the one we defeated just a few months ago \-- has already declared a rematch and is already organizing against us. Making reaching our goal before the deadline all the more important. The Democrats spent millions against us and now they're raising as much as they can to do the same all over again. Making our mark before Sunday's midnight deadline is the only way to ensure we have the resources required to run ads, send emails, reach out to voters, build infrastructure, recruit volunteers, and lay the groundwork to win not only this seat but also win back the House for Republicans. == == 200% Match Live Until 11:59 PM Tonight The Left outspent us 3:1. Our opponent is already piling cash into his campaign war chest. Falling short of our goal means putting lower taxes, a balanced budget, the protection of private health insurance, more jobs, and rebuilding our economy on hold. With just 4 days to go until our first critical campaign deadline of the year, we're relying on our grassroots to get us to the finish line. Together, we defeated Pelosi's candidate and flipped this seat from blue to red. Only together can we defeat him once again, defend this seat from Pelosi's millions, and win back the House for Republicans. == Thank you, Team Steel Alerts == ==** 200% Match Live Until 11:59 PM Tonight Paid for by Michelle Steel for Congress P.O Box 472 Surfside, CA 90743== == == == == | | Michelle Steel for Congress | 8907 Warner Ave Suite 220, Huntington Beach, CA 92647 | | Sent by mailto:action@standupforliberty.net powered by

name: Jake Duesenberg
subject: Vote Tomorrow to End Walz' Powers
body:
| [ ](http://www.action4liberty.com/?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=tomorrow_s_vote_202101&n=1)
---
Peter \-- Six Democrats who voted last year to End Walz' Emergency Powers, reneged on their commitment to voters and constituents by voting with Metro Democrats to protect Walz' Emergency Powers two weeks ago. **Reps Paul Marquart, Gene Pelowski, Julie Sandstede, Dave Lislegard, Mike Sundin and Rob Ecklund are a bunch of Con Artists who betrayed their voters! When the vote really mattered, they reversed course.** Like any politician, they are making a calculation - if I vote this way, will that hurt my chances of being re-elected? In one ear, the Democrat Establishment is threatening to withhold campaign support for them in 2022 if they don't get in line. In the other ear...are angry voters. That's where you come in! Rep Erik Mortensen will be making a motion to vote on the End Walz' Emergency Powers Resolution tomorrow and we have another shot to see if these six Democrats are willing to do the right thing. **They need to hear from all of us! Will you remind them of the importance to restore our democratic process by removing Governor Walz' unilateral Emergency Powers.**
## Call, text or email:
### **Rep Paul Marquart - 701-371-1949 -[pmarquart@hotmail.com](mailto:pmarquart@hotmail.com)******
### **Rep Gene Pelowski - 507-458-5988 -[gpelowski@hbci.com](mailto:gpelowski@hbci.com)**
### **Rep Julie Sandstede - 218-969-7009 -[julie4house@gmail.com](mailto:julie4house@gmail.com)**
### **Rep Dave Lislegard - 218-343-7965 -[davefor6b@gmail.com](mailto:davefor6b@gmail.com)**
### **Rep Mike Sundin - 218-391-5911 -[mikesundin11a@gmail.com](mailto:mikesundin11a@gmail.com)**
### **Rep Rob Ecklund - 218-341-6133 -[randjecklund@yahoo.com](mailto:randjecklund@yahoo.com) **
## Feel free to use these scripts or create your own:
Script: Rep _______, I want to talk to you about America's important democratic process. Nothing is more contrary to the tenets of a democratic form of government than when a state's Governor can create unilateral orders that carry the weight of laws. In our Republic, the legislature is tasked with this important power and with your remote legislative sessions, now more than ever, the legislature is fully equipped to deal with its lawmaking powers during the pandemic. However, Governor Walz appears to have no interest in returning to our democratic process. After 11 months, the people of Minnesota know this issue thick and though and we don't need to allow our system of government to be hijacked any longer. Support Erik Mortensen's Resolution to End Walz' Emergency Powers on Thursday. Alternate Script: Rep ________, you shocked many of us voters recently when you reversed your vote on Ending Walz' Emergency Powers. Why do you hate the democratic process? There's nothing further from a democracy than allowing a Governor to continue extending unilateral, Emergency Powers indefinitely. Stop wasting our time pretending like the Emergency Powers need to go through a lengthly debate in the Committee process. We've been under one man's rule for 11 months now. It's time to End Walz' Emergency Powers and restore our democratic process. Vote YES on Rep Mortensen's Resolution on Thursday. **Don't like to contact legislators or prefer to stay behind the scenes? Help us ramp up the pressure for this and other votes.[A donation of $100 can influence thousands of angry voters in our targets' districts. Even $50 or $25 can go a long way to helping us win this battle](https://www.action4liberty.com/donate?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=tomorrow_s_vote_202101&n=2)!** **In Liberty,

** **Jake Duesenberg** **President, Action 4 Liberty**
Action 4 Liberty · United States
This email was sent to [dpwillis67@gmail.com](dpwillis67@gmail.com). To stop receiving emails, [click here](https://www.action4liberty.com/unsubscribe?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=tomorrow_s_vote_202101&n=3).
You can also keep up with Jake Duesenberg on [Facebook](https://www.action4liberty.com/r?u=27Ax0UmWOX2J8J_QwK9Z6nyVoJL5zCIi1gu8lCoYmQrA8P7rhuOjJmdy-IRmglie&e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=tomorrow_s_vote_202101&n=4).
Created with [NationBuilder](https://www.action4liberty.com/r?u=SWqLExi-4iBlEOa5qgO58jA2d62deOsOLwOgchKDecY&e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=tomorrow_s_vote_202101&n=5), software for leaders.
clean_body: | Peter \-- Six Democrats who voted last year to End Walz' Emergency Powers, reneged on their commitment to voters and constituents by voting with Metro Democrats to protect Walz' Emergency Powers two weeks ago. Reps Paul Marquart, Gene Pelowski, Julie Sandstede, Dave Lislegard, Mike Sundin and Rob Ecklund are a bunch of Con Artists who betrayed their voters! When the vote really mattered, they reversed course. Like any politician, they are making a calculation - if I vote this way, will that hurt my chances of being re-elected? Hoosier Republican,

The Democrats are now in charge of the White House, the Senate, and the House, but we cannot let them continue their control past the 2022 midterm elections.

subject: Union Leader Op-Ed: "Chuck Morse and Jeb Bradley: Agenda for 2021 is rebuilding a strong NH"
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the New Hampshire Senate Republican PAC, Chuck Morse Chairman
body:

| Friends, In case you missed it, this weekend the Union Leader published an Op-Ed by Senate President Chuck Morse and Senate Majority Leader Jeb Bradley discussing the Republican "Rebuilding a Stronger New Hampshire" 2021 Action Plan! Read the Op-Ed below and check out our full [2021 Action Plan here](https://click.mlsend2.com/link/c/YT0xNjA3OTQ4NzMzNjYyNjMxNTM3JmM9ZzRvNyZlPTE5MjgmYj01MDk2ODkxNjUmZD1lNm42azB0.wOGmx-M-5BBYPmHPU7vS4Q7YYmqhrnlmtGqr8l0p2_8)! Thank you, The NH Senate Republicans P.S. If you want to help the NH Senate Republicans' fight to Rebuild a Stronger NH,[ please consider making a small contribution here!](https://click.mlsend2.com/link/c/YT0xNjA3OTQ4NzMzNjYyNjMxNTM3JmM9ZzRvNyZlPTE5MjgmYj01MDk2ODkxNjgmZD1lM2kzdjdu.LCPOfGTdbPsdT1Yl01AyKHEIQNQLd4KUgXuIDbMOlgU)
---
---
| |
---
|
---
| | |
---
| |
---
| Chuck Morse and Jeb Bradley: Agenda for 2021 is rebuilding a strong NH
---
| |
---
| Jan 24, 2021 2020 was an incredibly difficult year for all New Hampshire residents. We are blessed to have had so many people from all over our state step up in these challenging times to care for their friends and neighbors, to protect the public health and keep our economy largely open. Under Governor Chris Sununu’s able and consistent leadership, state government responded to the crisis of the pandemic and will continue to do so. As we prepare for the 2021 legislative session in the Senate, which is now under Republican leadership, we look forward to continuing to work with the governor as well as our Democratic colleagues. Keeping New Hampshire residents safe and healthy must remain our top priority until the pandemic has abated. We support the governor’s efforts to build a comprehensive testing network, assure supplies of protective gear and hospital capacity and now ramp up distribution of vaccines. We also recognize each of us has a responsibility to protect the health of our neighbors by wearing masks and socially distancing. Lastly we will continue to work with the governor to ensure distribution of federal stimulus funds to hard hit businesses and employees. While New Hampshire’s unemployment has dropped significantly, many people and businesses are still struggling with financial stress caused by the pandemic. Now is not the time to raise taxes on hard-working men and women. Prior to the pandemic, lower business taxes and workers compensation cost had made our state more competitive. That needs to continue if we are going to get people back to work and grow our economy. We also need to continue to reduce regulatory burdens and work for lower health care costs through associated health plans to also spur job creation. We must always remember that New Hampshire’s lack of an income tax, sales tax and capital gains tax has not only protected hard-working taxpayers, it has also led to a better job climate than any state in the Northeast. Creating a state budget that does not raise taxes while providing the resources to bipartisan priorities such as mental health and substance abuse prevention, child protection and education funding will be a key priority. Another priority will be continued assistance to property taxpayers through aid to municipalities and building upon the new resources in the past budget for education funding. We will further protect property taxpayers by rejecting the reintroduction of donor towns. The strong economy produced record revenues prior to the pandemic and restoring that economy must be a priority. The pandemic has taught us a lot about education and the way children learn. Remote and hybrid learning has shown that education does not need to exist in a one-size-fits-all schoolhouse. We will give greater opportunities to all New Hampshire children and parents to choose the education that best fits the student. That means support for public charter schools, establishing Education Savings Accounts, providing adequacy funding for home-schooled students, targeted aid for special education students in small school districts, and grants for kindergarten. New Hampshire is one of the safest states in the country and it is up to us to ensure that we remain that way. Police departments must have the resources they need to protect our communities. Our bail system must not allow repeat offenders to avoid prosecution and now allow release of violent offenders. Other priorities include funding for clean water projects and wastewater projects, resources for affordable housing and homelessness, broadband deployment and a truly voluntary family leave plan not funded by an income tax. While New Hampshire has thankfully escaped the controversy of other states’ election problems, we will build upon previous reforms such as voter ID to ensure that everyone with a right to vote in New Hampshire can in fact do so in a transparent and honest manner. We have an opportunity to bring New Hampshire back from the pandemic in better shape than ever and that’s exactly what we plan to do. We approach this responsibility with humility but look forward to overcoming the challenges ahead and making a positive impact on the lives of Granite Staters. Sen. Chuck Morse (R-Salem) represents District 22. Sen. Jeb Bradley (R-Wolfeboro) represents District 3.

name: Elizabeth Warren
subject: I'm partnering with Senate Majority Leader Chuck Schumer and Congresswoman Ayanna Pressley to set a bold plan
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Warren Democrats
body:
There's been a lot of talk about unity recently. For me, unity is about doing the work that the American people want done. | | | [](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/28525150/45c30650/1c415fc94/66eb6ca2/174802148/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVm1hWEp6ZEc1aGJXVWxKUT09IjoiIiwiSlNWc1lYTjBibUZ0WlNVbCI6IiIsIkpTVjZhWEFsSlE9PSI6IjE4MzI2In0%3D/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://elizabethwarren.com?source=em-header&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&zip=18326")
---
There's been a lot of talk about unity recently.

For me, unity is about doing the work that the American people want done.

It's not about ideology. It's not about helping just the richest Americans or some interest group -- unity is about doing things that the American people want to see us do.

And you know one thing that unites Americans? Canceling student loan debt.

It's a hugely popular proposal that would immediately put hundreds and thousands of dollars back in the pockets of millions of Americans, start to close the racial wealth gap, and boost our economy.

And the president can get it done without waiting for Congress.

I'm partnering with Senate Majority Leader Chuck Schumer and Congresswoman Ayanna Pressley to set a bold plan for how Joe Biden can use his executive authority to deliver meaningful relief to struggling Americans and broadly cancel up to $50,000 in student loan debt.

**[I need you to be a part of this effort-- because we can only get it done if we fight for it side by side as a grassroots movement. Add your name and join the fight to get this done.](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/28525150/45c30650/1c415fc94/66eb6ca5/174802148/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVm1hWEp6ZEc1aGJXVWxKUT09IjoiIiwiSlNWc1lYTjBibUZ0WlNVbCI6IiIsIkpTVjZhWEFsSlE9PSI6IjE4MzI2IiwiZTNzZ2NtVm1ZMjlrWlNCOWZRPT0iOiJFTVowM1BfU0dOX1NUTF9FXzIwMjEwMTI2X1YxUzJfUCJ9/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://act.elizabethwarren.com/page/s/ew-student-loans?source=EMZ03P_SGN_STL_E_20210126_V1S2_P&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&zip=18326")**

We need to take action because families need relief. Over 40 million Americans are being crushed by over $1.5 trillion in federal student loan debt.

In the middle of an economy that's been badly hit by the pandemic, the student debt crisis acts like an anchor, preventing a swift recovery and restricting opportunity and prosperity for millions of American families.

Canceling student loan debt as soon as possible would mean substantial and immediate relief for tens of millions of Americans, many of whom have suddenly been laid off or are worried that their jobs are next.

And communities of color, which have been hit hardest by the health and economic consequences of the coronavirus pandemic, disproportionately bear the burden of student debt.

Black students are on average nearly 20 percentage points more likely to take out federal student loans. Half of Black borrowers and a third of Latino borrowers default on their loans within 20 years. Canceling student loan debt would increase wealth for Black and Latino families, help them avoid default, and start to close the racial wealth gap.

Economists agree that canceling student loan debt would also help boost our struggling economy through a consumer-driven economic stimulus, greater home-buying rates and housing stability, expanded access to more affordable financial products including car loans and mortgages, higher college completion rates, and greater small business formation. This is a no brainer for our economy.

Look: we all saw what happened in 2008. After the financial crisis, young people were shoved into a weak job market and plunged even deeper into student debt. And today, as workers face layoffs and frozen wages in the wake of the coronavirus pandemic, student loan borrowers who were barely staying afloat are now drowning. When Americans can't fully participate in our economy, we see a ripple effect across our entire economy and a slowdown in economic growth. This affects all of us, including those of us who don't have student loans or have already paid off their student debt.

We can do better than this. And Democrats will.

**[Join the fight alongside me, Chuck Schumer, and Ayanna Pressley if you agree that the president should take executive action to broadly cancel student loan debt. Add your name now.](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/28525150/45c30650/1c415fc94/66eb6ca5/174802148/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVm1hWEp6ZEc1aGJXVWxKUT09IjoiIiwiSlNWc1lYTjBibUZ0WlNVbCI6IiIsIkpTVjZhWEFsSlE9PSI6IjE4MzI2IiwiZTNzZ2NtVm1ZMjlrWlNCOWZRPT0iOiJFTVowM1BfU0dOX1NUTF9FXzIwMjEwMTI2X1YxUzJfUCJ9/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://act.elizabethwarren.com/page/s/ew-student-loans?source=EMZ03P_SGN_STL_E_20210126_V1S2_P&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&zip=18326")**

Thanks for being a part of this,

Elizabeth

| [**ADD YOUR NAME**](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/28525150/45c30650/1c415fc94/66eb6ca5/174802148/VEsC/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVm1hWEp6ZEc1aGJXVWxKUT09IjoiIiwiSlNWc1lYTjBibUZ0WlNVbCI6IiIsIkpTVjZhWEFsSlE9PSI6IjE4MzI2IiwiZTNzZ2NtVm1ZMjlrWlNCOWZRPT0iOiJFTVowM1BfU0dOX1NUTF9FXzIwMjEwMTI2X1YxUzJfUCJ9/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://act.elizabethwarren.com/page/s/ew-student-loans?source=EMZ03P_SGN_STL_E_20210126_V1S2_P&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&zip=18326")

When Americans can't fully participate in our economy, we see a ripple effect across our entire economy and a slowdown in economic growth. This affects all of us, including those of us who don't have student loans or have already paid off their student debt. We can do better than this. And Democrats will. "" Thanks for being a part of this, Elizabeth | "" | | | "" | "" | "" | "" | "" | "" ---|---|---|---|---|--- | Paid for by Warren Democrats All content (C) 2021 Warren Democrats, All Rights Reserved PO Box 171375, Boston, MA 02117

name: Senator Erica Smith
subject: I'm Running for US Senate
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Erica For US - Senate 2022 Campaign Committee
body:
`Friends,`
`I may be a DC outsider, but I am a North Carolina insider and I think that's just what we need in the US Senate. Senator Burr has announced that he will not be seeking re-election in 2022 and as some of you may already know,[ ](https://act.myngp.com/el/1a0qlsQMogE9xqJPLKYOzd2M7DqhgewnCP-r4lgM2oE=/J-gloXUFWtIST8ZHAjXzqB2pfvLQkLFD8W-YuYdXai8= in whatever you can: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/erica4ncemail)[I'm hoping to earn the distinct privilege of representing North Carolina in the US Senate. ](https://act.myngp.com/el/1a0qlsQMogE9xqJPLKYOzd2M7DqhgewnCP-r4lgM2oE=/RDQgTtnMAt54ij85dRPZ21WVFWTpUGg_XkxttzkgDPE=)`
I grew up in rural North Carolina. I've represented rural North Carolina. I'm an HBCU alumna, a member of clergy, and servant leader with deep ties to the black community at large in North Carolina. I have worked in indigenous communities and I have organized alongside Latino and LGBTQ communities. `I have shown up for them and I will continue to show up for ALL OF US. I will listen and be an advocate for equality and justice, just as my record shows that I have been. `
I will be relentless in my pursuit of racial and climate justice and an economy that works for everyone. I will fight everyday to preserve the dignity of work for North Carolinians, and to make their wages dignified. I will take on the monopolies that are strangling our small businesses and I will do whatever it takes to protect our climate and this planet. I will ensure that every American has affordable and quality healthcare and that we have a system centered around people, not profits. I will not allow the US Senate to continue to choose lobbyists over our children when it comes to common sense gun reform and I will fight to usher in the structural changes we need to dismantle the systems of racism and oppression that are tyrannizing and killing people of color across this country.
With a bold platform for change, I can bridge the rural-urban divide and unite North Carolina. Showing up everywhere, taking no one for granted and fighting for every vote, we can follow in Stacey Abrams footsteps and make North Carolina the next Georgia.
THIS broad and diverse coalition of young and old, urban and rural, black, brown and white, this is how we win. This is the coalition that I have built in the last 20 years in this state, and represented in elected office for the last 12 years. [This is the coalition that will flip NC. ](https://act.myngp.com/el/1a0qlsQMogE9xqJPLKYOzd2M7DqhgewnCP-r4lgM2oE=/RDQgTtnMAt54ij85dRPZ21WVFWTpUGg_XkxttzkgDPE=)
`We will create infrastructure in rural counties across the state and aggressively register voters, creating a new electorate that will benefit Democrats up and down the ballot come 2022. [But I need you.](https://act.myngp.com/el/1a0qlsQMogE9xqJPLKYOzd2M7DqhgewnCP-r4lgM2oE=/RDQgTtnMAt54ij85dRPZ21WVFWTpUGg_XkxttzkgDPE=) I don't accept fossil fuel money or corporate PAC money. This is a grassroots, people-powered campaign. If we are to be successful in 2022 and deliver real progress for North Carolina, [I need your help. ](https://act.myngp.com/el/1a0qlsQMogE9xqJPLKYOzd2M7DqhgewnCP-r4lgM2oE=/RDQgTtnMAt54ij85dRPZ21WVFWTpUGg_XkxttzkgDPE=)`
`Chip in whatever you can: [secure.actblue.com/donate/erica4ncemail](https://act.myngp.com/el/1a0qlsQMogE9xqJPLKYOzd2M7DqhgewnCP-r4lgM2oE=/RDQgTtnMAt54ij85dRPZ21WVFWTpUGg_XkxttzkgDPE=)`
`Together, we can win. Together, we can change North Carolina and inch closer to the Beloved Community Reverend Martin Luther King Jr. fought for and dreamed of. `
`One of us for all of us,`
`Erica `

Paid for by Erica For US - Senate 2022 Campaign Committee
---
Erica For US
PO Box 1236
Gaston NC 27832 United States
If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please [unsubscribe](https://act.myngp.com/el/1a0qlsQMogE9xqJPLKYOzd2M7DqhgewnCP-r4lgM2oE=/1gcB-ogg-JpBcOOLfbY9V87jKe-NvZZ8WtXLH3exrpo=).

subject: Joe Biden's radical plans
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TIM SCOTT FOR SENATE
body:
Friend,

**Joe Biden is no moderate. He 's already off to a FAST START executing his radical liberal agenda.**

Some of his plans include:
* Ending America's energy independence and relying on foreign enemies for oil and gas.
* Ending deportation of illegal immigrants and opening our borders.
* Raising taxes and making it harder to do business, thus endangering the American Dream.

Conservatives cannot stand by while Biden's Democrats pass this radical agenda. [**Will you help me push back against what the Democrats are doing?**](https://secure.winred.com/tim-scott-for-senate/joe-biden-is-no-moderate/?utm_campaign=20210127_TY.100609_tim-scott_t1046689-1260&utm_medium=email&utm_source=TY.100609&utm_content=20210127_joe-bidens-radical-plans/)

I need your support to stand up for conservative values in the Senate and encourage my colleagues to do the same.

There's no time to waste. Biden is fast becoming Obama 3.0 as he tries to fundamentally change this country.

[**Will you make a donation to help Republicans stand up to Joe Biden and oppose his radical agenda?**](https://secure.winred.com/tim-scott-for-senate/joe-biden-is-no-moderate/?utm_campaign=20210127_TY.100609_tim-scott_t1046689-1260&utm_medium=email&utm_source=TY.100609&utm_content=20210127_joe-bidens-radical-plans/)

Tim Scott

name: Team Cammack
subject: Online Censorship
body:
Has it gone too far?
---
| | | | | | [ ](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001LO50RImr2SGrbnuweg2935F5jb5WCLryWVVWYw6nmziXfuCXgILJcPRJb130REokMbodPQykS2x65rGANwEpPP8QZb-PhIyh93psIJ1K1CrxXISakNkROGNGPvjmTdhLo3sojKx2qxIsSZ85oNtdaXuR_8ptkygd3BmUI6g8lwg=&c=ujb7b03EB29jwoBIztgDZv26R1OITYl0aFPRpu1RbPMOYz-jS-5fyg==&ch=gUv93HdzMVV8gMLkgljo86G-p89-P0qXs2DwI0nlFeoSaE4MIMf1Xw==)
---
| Patriot,
The First Amendment is what sets our country apart and makes America the example of freedom to the world. America's variety of online platforms gives us the opportunity and accessibility to express our thoughts and opinions. However, concerns across the country have risen when it comes to censorship across social media channels.
Kat wants to know your thoughts about this pressing issue. Do you think free speech is being jeopardized by censorship? [Take our poll.](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001LO50RImr2SGrbnuweg2935F5jb5WCLryWVVWYw6nmziXfuCXgILJcPRJb130REokUjEjyNp40Qcy9_ls0wwPnBOkDukVNgvko5RPE7s_lyMjicUeA-W17fAuCBIDDJYFT_XB-J1A4GuZa-jiPiQWfvFayIvwI96REUgrmOEb9zbZ68Dcgv7ExuWBr1oIiT3eWKDruot171M=&c=ujb7b03EB29jwoBIztgDZv26R1OITYl0aFPRpu1RbPMOYz-jS-5fyg==&ch=gUv93HdzMVV8gMLkgljo86G-p89-P0qXs2DwI0nlFeoSaE4MIMf1Xw==)
---
| [ ](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001LO50RImr2SGrbnuweg2935F5jb5WCLryWVVWYw6nmziXfuCXgILJcPRJb130REokUjEjyNp40Qcy9_ls0wwPnBOkDukVNgvko5RPE7s_lyMjicUeA-W17fAuCBIDDJYFT_XB-J1A4GuZa-jiPiQWfvFayIvwI96REUgrmOEb9zbZ68Dcgv7ExuWBr1oIiT3eWKDruot171M=&c=ujb7b03EB29jwoBIztgDZv26R1OITYl0aFPRpu1RbPMOYz-jS-5fyg==&ch=gUv93HdzMVV8gMLkgljo86G-p89-P0qXs2DwI0nlFeoSaE4MIMf1Xw==)
---
| Silencing our voices or preventing us from exercising our freedom of speech is not only wrong but also un-American and unacceptable. In a country where free speech is a pillar of our society, it is critical that we band together to ensure that conservative voices and American voices across the country are heard loud and clear.

What is the Republican State Leadership Committee (RSLC)?
The Republican State Leadership Committee (RSLC) isn't just another alphabet soup political committee. We're the largest caucus of Republican state leaders in the nation with one unified goal: winning. Through innovative strategies and record-breaking support across all 50 states, we recruit, train, and support Republicans to state offices. Following a historically successful 2020 election cycle, state Republicans currently hold 62 of 99 state legislative chambers, 25 of 45 lieutenant governor seats, 28 of 50 secretary of state offices, and 11 of 12 independently-elected agriculture officials -- thanks in large part to the support from patriots like you. You can learn more about us at [rslc.gop](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001pdsXI-nxb3sT8-hUISJD0BAsJ_kbvB9K-ZeJXPWZvKd3IoHWRcz3IekL-lhab1vSOG2t0uce696G9EoQigzQY3CDDrRWVfFQth713DGrxGHK5Ow-qWFGekr-dUCsCZLNE_kUCEYQnmc=&c=f-Zyd0ym_xkbbdT8rjEKF7mr27jYmhXLXTzUnLl8827uVbrfA0hivg==&ch=h_ks-B8-1aw_s5UmA_Nf6RX4cErhQWEKwN9JKxnS4xzdibHjC2MLYQ==).

clean_body: But we still need your help. BREAKING: IOWA REPUBLICAN WINS SPECIAL ELECTION Friend, This is HUGE news. Yesterday, Republican Adrian Dickey BEAT his far-left Democrat opponent, holding this seat in the Iowa state Senate for Republicans and protecting the Republican Majority in the Iowa State Legislature. Democrats called this their "first major test of grassroots power in the states." And Friend, they absolutely FAILED their test. Last night showed that Republicans are more motivated than EVER to protect their majorities in the states and WIN special elections just like these. But we need to keep the momentum going if we want to maintain and defend conservative majorities in states across the country. == == == == == == If we want to keep WINNING and delivering on a successful America First agenda for hard-working Americans, we need to ensure Republicans in the states win every single special election in the weeks and months ahead. No one had unseated an incumbent Democrat in California in nearly 3 decades and despite having $20+ million spent against us, we did. Together. Now, just 5 days away from our first deadline of the year, I once again have to ask for your support.

[](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001572s4BkfIKhgNpaM2tMQ5ShvRGNn6SbWvDrSac8irjdqDQhyBv37Omu_pdKEGAsX9gvstNLHnflBL7upTR6jD8koGSTS_Hu4eYnPf9RbU81mndht3lwxowQcnNOdbArZ0NpPS89t9L93d2J95seIJWi7HINufTHcfo9dXjqa2b2_7OCO-0dkWYuCo8EwL_YhClpi6JBXlrE0kScumPfSY7E4pjKejCUT7VmD_CEn8kxP6Ix0bVsEBozOfpU2tUj02zNX7EX5fDwr0i90dwfXT5K7Vm5U_KRwvo1yI6b9SZN4C-FQxTDj44FoG8mtkyi8vAfdjAU1XPXjJAkfOQ77KXbVBUVhzXIa2AxOO4Tp1zH9eY1eIvJLUm6r6x11GDg0T9n1I1ZsvBa1GVPbuJE-U7DM4aLUGIsvZELDh0KwTfk=&c=vYKCJfHoD7aK5lPZ1j2KN1ka9JnSaW-xMo4GMlm9_3SZ6-YV9bpovw==&ch=nAc27ipVFiKhbhd84wbEwclLN3qJHK3JnLJ8XQLDY6LsfWNQVvTorg==)

Friend, it's Young Kim.

Nearly two years ago, we set out to do the impossible -- flip California's 39th Congressional District from blue to red. No one had unseated an incumbent Democrat in California in nearly 3 decades and despite having $20+ million spent against us, we did. _Together. _

**Now, just 5 days away from our first deadline of the year, I once again have to ask for your support.** I hate to do it but meeting our goals now lays the groundwork for the next two years and ensures we have the resources, infrastructure, and the grassroots team we need to defend this seat from the Democrats. It's simply too important.

Our grassroots team is unstoppable. And when we work together, there is nothing we can't achieve. That's why we've got to give this race everything we've got. Last November, we won by the smallest of margins -- only a couple thousand votes, so securing this seat again will not be easy. On top of that, we are only a handful of seats away from winning back the House Majority.

That means lower taxes, fewer regulations, affordable healthcare, and a pro-business environment are all within reach. But it comes down to defending this seat and winning back the House for Republicans. We can't do that without reaching our goal before the first critical deadline of the year. And we can't make our mark without you.

**[Friend, just 5 days out from our first fundraising deadline of the year, can I count on you to take a stand?](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001572s4BkfIKhgNpaM2tMQ5ShvRGNn6SbWvDrSac8irjdqDQhyBv37OoI0XW5wtzARNLOmeTBqFBEU-raDKAXe_34c7RkwbjaJT8A91EP2uE5uZIm5QaODcdQd85pf1mCFTYn4A1hMNn5QL0r85g6pCqv_QqEPD7Pi9gJmH6pwdn3XhpbxRgYsrb20SPpXoY3vnNihtfHcsbUI1XBlURgsYWAnh3aHqnd_1SKL37B0afmz_kKT1U12zwzf0gFc47SnZOm6PWkJEyw47svCzGwoPXgRzHsesQoJVjPnLnLTz4lqzMxk9_HdC-CXOOksGiyLpmfr9qaGE79wamGEDyN1xvo1Y3vL0wv4HM1rR70orQWmLisJT4SBXC69whaJTZx7CFUIwPG8UVijVi5cPqld3mgyOUWPRhA2RlJHfdQpuyM=&c=vYKCJfHoD7aK5lPZ1j2KN1ka9JnSaW-xMo4GMlm9_3SZ6-YV9bpovw==&ch=nAc27ipVFiKhbhd84wbEwclLN3qJHK3JnLJ8XQLDY6LsfWNQVvTorg==) It's the only way to help win back the House for Republicans.**

I am proud to be an immigrant and conservative woman. And I am just as proud to be one of the first Korean-American women to serve in Congress. It's an honor I do not take likely. I will continue to fight on behalf of hardworking Americans to keep the American Dream alive for all. But I can't do it alone.

[**Will you join me in protecting the American Dream?**](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001572s4BkfIKhgNpaM2tMQ5ShvRGNn6SbWvDrSac8irjdqDQhyBv37OoI0XW5wtzARNLOmeTBqFBEU-raDKAXe_34c7RkwbjaJT8A91EP2uE5uZIm5QaODcdQd85pf1mCFTYn4A1hMNn5QL0r85g6pCqv_QqEPD7Pi9gJmH6pwdn3XhpbxRgYsrb20SPpXoY3vnNihtfHcsbUI1XBlURgsYWAnh3aHqnd_1SKL37B0afmz_kKT1U12zwzf0gFc47SnZOm6PWkJEyw47svCzGwoPXgRzHsesQoJVjPnLnLTz4lqzMxk9_HdC-CXOOksGiyLpmfr9qaGE79wamGEDyN1xvo1Y3vL0wv4HM1rR70orQWmLisJT4SBXC69whaJTZx7CFUIwPG8UVijVi5cPqld3mgyOUWPRhA2RlJHfdQpuyM=&c=vYKCJfHoD7aK5lPZ1j2KN1ka9JnSaW-xMo4GMlm9_3SZ6-YV9bpovw==&ch=nAc27ipVFiKhbhd84wbEwclLN3qJHK3JnLJ8XQLDY6LsfWNQVvTorg==)

clean_body: No one had unseated an incumbent Democrat in California in nearly 3 decades and despite having $20+ million spent against us, we did. Together. Now, just 5 days away from our first deadline of the year, I once again have to ask for your support. == Friend, it's Young Kim. Nearly two years ago, we set out to do the impossible -- flip California's 39th Congressional District from blue to red. No one had unseated an incumbent Democrat in California in nearly 3 decades and despite having $20+ million spent against us, we did. Together. Now, just 5 days away from our first deadline of the year, I once again have to ask for your support. I hate to do it but meeting our goals now lays the groundwork for the next two years and ensures we have the resources, infrastructure, and the grassroots team we need to defend this seat from the Democrats. It's simply too important. | | == ** | | == | == | | == | == | | == == As the second bluest seat held by a conservative, CA39 remains a top-target. Our grassroots team is unstoppable. Last November, we won by the smallest of margins -- only a couple thousand votes, so securing this seat again will not be easy. That means lower taxes, fewer regulations, affordable healthcare, and a pro-business environment are all within reach. But it comes down to defending this seat and winning back the House for Republicans. We can't do that without reaching our goal before the first critical deadline of the year. ✅ Halted our path to energy independence and killed thousands of jobs by stopping construction on the Keystone XL Pipeline
✅ Made our country more vulnerable by opening our borders and decreasing border security
✅ Hindered our country's growth by rejoining restrictive international deals like the Paris Climate Accord
✅ _... and he will do so much more **unless we can build up enough momentum to show the radical left that Americans stand AGAINST Biden 's plan for America. **_

clean_body: This deadline is approaching == Friend, Our first and most important end-of-month fundraising goal of 2021 is just around the corner. == **== Meeting, and surpassing our goal will help put us in the strongest position possible to fight against liberal Joe Biden's left-wing agenda. Look at what he's already done in the one week since he's taken office: ✅ Halted our path to energy independence and killed thousands of jobs by stopping construction on the Keystone XL Pipeline ✅ Made our country more vulnerable by opening our borders and decreasing border security ✅ Hindered our country's growth by rejoining restrictive international deals like the Paris Climate Accord ✅ ... and he will do so much more unless we can build up enough momentum to show the radical left that Americans stand AGAINST Biden 's plan for America. With the Democrats now controlling the White House, the Senate, and Congress, we must stick up for our conservative principles now more than ever. That means we need all the grassroots support we can get from hard working Americans like you to meet our fundraising goals and show the Democrats we will not cower to their liberal agenda. == == == == == == == Thank you, Notifications via Team Davis Paid for and authorized by Rodney for Congress == PO BOX 344 Taylorville, IL 62568 This message reflects the opinions and representations of the Rodney for Congress. | | Rodney for Congress | PO BOX 344, Taylorville, IL 62568 | | Sent by mailto:action@standupforliberty.net powered by

[Help Team Rodney meet our goal!](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001DetEJe6TO-z-mynZO16CgZpTG8PWrbRe4EqKZlZDt6APksgsaNjkHto-d6283y2PmA_CKv1VDgPJAF2KSoLeqm7mGKnmxDZPnYQkClbpNjf-bw8oLcA0aemR3sFcTCvuPfHdYfC26BPJrvDJ_0bDtUq_PJEUgkU5lPSG4wgTafpHz16ADOgUVAGvUW-VfjUf5ueooU0jPL69ERQQsnZ_OPGN8_L-RxclJrUVaVIHiUzZ7Uf2_sNKdeNgAM2HUN1eFXi0rrnUVJ1vDCCcOWWsXMkFPcRlmjgAbV404zYSjmJdeXCDEJqoCHSqYAlZogwPt4WIf8UjdZFgVdZK0E01FO75PHe5B074eK2jYDlKkEXiFnVDMp1NOBxniX4xfJfArbYT30gZ4pZ2ebsz9vNbUvm2BkMGeazfz0r7fL4PwRekiemuA_zzzv83A__-CtKL&c=1KOAGNcOQogkiBXk7E1ZOJ61NshEwQ3PuC_e8dw8OMvMIND8lvOFlw==&ch=tfTFll6481WYOgf6cmSWbfVsYIaTYsXvoFaUzZofLSonYjtiTx5mew==)

Over the past week, all we've seen from the Biden Administration is a slew of troublesome executive orders that hurt hard working Americans like you, Friend. **Here 's what's President Biden has already done so far:**
**✔ ️ Opened our country's borders
✔️ Halted construction on the Keystone XL Pipeline; blocking our path to energy independence
✔️ Rejoined taxpayer funded international plans like the Paris Climate Accords
✔️...and so much more!** That is why I wanted to reach out for your support in meeting my first end-of-month fundraising goal of the new year. This fundraising goal means more than any other this entire year because it will put us on the right track for the rest of 2021 to fight back against Biden's radical agenda! clean_body: Will you help me fight back against the left? &zwnj == == Friend, It is critical we start this year strong. Over the past week, all we've seen from the Biden Administration is a slew of troublesome executive orders that hurt hard working Americans like you, Friend. Here 's what's President Biden has already done so far: ✔ ️ Opened our country's borders ✔️ Halted construction on the Keystone XL Pipeline; blocking our path to energy independence ✔️ Rejoined taxpayer funded international plans like the Paris Climate Accords ✔️...and so much more! That is why I wanted to reach out for your support in meeting my first end-of-month fundraising goal of the new year. This fundraising goal means more than any other this entire year because it will put us on the right track for the rest of 2021 to fight back against Biden's radical agenda! == == Biden's agenda weakens America and only seeks to adhere to radical left progressives. I ran for Congress because I believe that America is the greatest country on the planet and is worth fighting for. I will fight for ALL of Iowa to ensure that we get a fair deal in Joe Biden's America. Will you help me reach my first fundraising goal so that I can have the resources to fight back against the radical left's agenda? == == == == == == Thank you, Congresswoman Ashley Hinson | PAID FOR BY ASHLEY HINSON FOR CONGRESS PO BOX 811, MARION, IA 52302 == | | ASHLEY HINSON FOR CONGRESS | PO BOX 811, Marion, IA 52302 | | Sent by mailto:action@standupforliberty.net powered by

Her record is under attack and we need your help! == With your support, we will have the resources we need to fight back and put an end to radical ideas like state-run health care, defunding the police, and higher taxes on hardworking Iowans. | == | | == == | == == == | | == == == | == == == | | == == Friend, our team is counting on your support, and any amount you can afford will make a difference. Thank you, Team Reynolds \------ BEGIN FORWARDED MESSAGE ------ From: Governor Kim Reynolds <==> Subject: Need your support, Friend Friend, Far Left Liberal Democrats have already begun to attack my record. They don't support my plans to grow the economy, lower taxes, and put students first in the state of Iowa. But make no mistake, I am not going to stop fighting for YOU so that Iowa can come back stronger than ever. In order to fight back against the Left's attacks and their radical agenda, I need your support. == == == == == Friend, can I count on you to join my team today to help us reach our critical January fundraising goal? With your help I know we can fight back with the facts about our positive agenda for the state of Iowa. Any amount you can contribute will help us do that. == == == == == Join me today so we can keep fighting for a brighter future for the next generation. Apparently, it wasn't bad enough that the Left took control of the Senate--now we know that far-left VP Kamala Harris will be their trusty tie-breaking vote.

Kamala Harris was the most liberal Senator IN THE COUNTRY, and now she is the one casting the deciding vote. While this fundraising goal is admittedly ambitious, it's ESSENTIAL to building a strong foundation that so we can compete with the Democrat Machine and win back the Senate. == == Friend, we're in trouble. Apparently, it wasn't bad enough that the Left took control of the Senate--now we know that far-left VP Kamala Harris will be their trusty tie-breaking vote. Kamala Harris was the most liberal Senator IN THE COUNTRY, and now she is the one casting the deciding vote. In the past, Harris has fought for MASSIVE government spending that would raise taxes on hard working families, and even co-sponsored the Green New Deal that would bankrupt our country and kill good-paying American jobs. We CANNOT allow her to force her left-wing policies on the American people.== We can't surrender our country's future to the Radical Left agenda. == We need you. == Thank you for stepping up, Senate GOP HQ == If you want to help Republicans TAKE BACK THE SENATE, text WIN to 55404 to receive mobile alerts! name: levi fetterman
subject: Fwd: All I can say is THANK YOU!!! 🥳🤯
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fetterman for PA
body:
jawn and gisele are my humans.
#
hiiiiiiii, Peter. levi fetterman here — rescue dog and pennsylvania’s official dog.
jawn and gisele are my humans! look:
[](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/975?refcode=em20210127-66&t=1&akid=66%2E434096%2Em77uTM)
things have been wild around our house since jawn announced he’s gearing up to run for senate. our whole family is excited. mostly me. but jawn and his team still need to get as many humans as possible excited about our campaign.
**[please throw jawn’s campaign a few bones, or $5, if you can. we are so grateful you’re here.](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/975?refcode=em20210127-66&t=2&akid=66%2E434096%2Em77uTM)**
love u. thank u. u are enough.
levi 🐶
levi fetterman
official dog of pennsylvania
not a human fetterman
p.s. they put me on an official campaign shirt. **[you can pick one up right here.](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/977?t=3&akid=66%2E434096%2Em77uTM)**
\----------Forwarded message----------
From: John Fetterman <hello@johnfetterman.com>
Date: Monday, Jan 25, 2021
Subject: All I can say is THANK YOU!!!
#
WOOOOOW, Peter. 🥳
We’re closing in on $1.1 million raised since I first talked about running for U.S. Senate. **All I can say is****THANK YOU!!!**
Gisele and I are *literally* overwhelmed (and so is Levi 🐶). Ninety-nine percent of our donations are $200 or less, and the majority of donors are from Pennsylvania. This is really grassroots, Peter. I mean honestly.**He****re’s where we’re at:**
✅ 33,000 donations
✅ $32 average donation
✅ And contributions from all 67 counties in Pennsylvania
**[Can we count on you to chip in $5, or whatever you can right now, to keep up the momentum? We’ve got a *lot* of work to do, and every contribution we receive this early helps our campaign start off in the strongest position possible.](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/975?refcode=em20210127-66&t=4&akid=66%2E434096%2Em77uTM)**
**[Chip in $5](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/975?refcode=em20210127-66&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=5&akid=66%2E434096%2Em77uTM)**
Look, Pennsylvania is going to be the most *important* Senate race of 2022 — and we’re doing this in a way that respects each other. As my amazing wife says: You help make the world feel a little smaller when it can feel so big and lonely.
**So again, THANK. YOU. SO. MUCH. 😭🙏**
See you out there,
John Fetterman
Lieutenant Governor of Pennsylvania
P.S. It may seem early, but *every* bit of early support goes a LONG way when you’re planning a run for U.S. Senate. **[If you’re on board, please contribute $5, or anything you can, to grow our campaign early on.](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/975?refcode=em20210127-66&t=6&akid=66%2E434096%2Em77uTM)**

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-emails?refcode=em20210127-66-footer&t=7&refcode2=66_434096_m77uTM&akid=66%2E434096%2Em77uTM)**
---
[](https://www.facebook.com/JohnFettermanPA/) | [](https://twitter.com/johnfetterman) | [](https://www.instagram.com/johnfetterman/)
Paid for by Fetterman for PA
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you. But, if you'd like to receive fewer emails, [you can do so here](https://act.johnfetterman.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/). If you need to remove yourself from our email list, [click here to unsubscribe](https://act.johnfetterman.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=8&akid=66%2E434096%2Em77uTM).
Email us: info@johnfetterman.com
Mail us: Fetterman for PA, PO Box 6061, Pittsburgh PA 15211

name: Moms for Remembrance
subject: Holocaust Remembrance Day
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Moms in Office
body:
Peter,
Today we honor the memory of 6 million Jews and millions of others murdered during the Holocaust. We pledge to never forget the lives lost and together we must vow: Never Again.
The United Nations designated January 27th, the Anniversary of the liberation of Aushwitz-Birkenau, as International Holocaust Remembrance Day. On this day, we are called to remember the six million Jewish victims of the Holocaust and we are also reminded of the responsibility we all carry to protect the lessons and legacy of Holocaust history and to defend truth, now more than ever.
76 years after the liberation of Auschwitz our country and communities across the world continue to fight against anti-Semitism. We must stand up to hatred and speak out against the resurgent tide of anti-Semitic attacks within and beyond our borders.
All of us at Moms in Office vow to never forget the atrocities of the Holocaust, the millions of lives lost and we pledge to pass down the history and the legacy of the Holocaust to the next generation.
We stand with the Jewish community today and everyday and we will continue to speak loudly against the resurgent attacks against Jews across America.
I am asking you today to not stay silent. I am asking you today to stand with us against Anti-semitism.
If you are able to, please support our fight against Anti-semitism by making a donation to the [Jewish Democratic Council of America.](https://click.everyaction.com/k/24308428/270321769/561362393?refcode=0127&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg4MjY1IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjg5OWFhZWUyLTA4NjEtZWIxMS05ODg5LTAwMTU1ZDQzYzk5MiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=qPxw_UR2uw9UySbMjViwYbRECD_ag49XVthGFvxP95Y=)

Thank you!
Sincerely,
Simona Grace
[](https://click.everyaction.com/k/24308429/270321770/-1950126080?refcode=0127&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg4MjY1IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjg5OWFhZWUyLTA4NjEtZWIxMS05ODg5LTAwMTU1ZDQzYzk5MiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=qPxw_UR2uw9UySbMjViwYbRECD_ag49XVthGFvxP95Y=)

The America-First Movement has taken off because it's what our citizens want: for the government to put AMERICANS FIRST. Liz Cheney, who is the current Republican Conference Chairwoman and the 3rd ranking Republican in Congress, crossed the line when she went along with the spiteful Democrats and voted to impeach President Trump. She clearly does not represent the 74 million Americans who support a leader that takes on the Swamp, rather than swims in it. | | | == | | | == | I'm leading an effort to oust Liz Cheney from Republican leadership and replace other RINOs in our conference who refuse to represent the will of everyday Americans. We need to act now if we are going to save the Republican Party, but I'm going to need your support. I explain why Cheney has to go on this Hannity segment: | == | This is our one chance to take back our Party from the RINOs and the Swamp. name: Chris Ekstrom
subject: Our party, NOT Liz Cheney's party
body:
| | | [ ](https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=7RSOW&m=jAtxym4norcqI4c&b=WmlFxN3K6yv3tZ5kYcdqRQ)
---

Hi Peter,

My name is Christopher Ekstrom. I am the conservative businessman and donor who is fighting the Bidens, Bushes, Romneys, and Cheneys- and trying to take back the GOP! [Now more than ever, it's important that you join me in that fight](https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=7RSOW&m=jAtxym4norcqI4c&b=WmlFxN3K6yv3tZ5kYcdqRQ)!

**_I am hearing many disgusted patriots wonder aloud if we need a third party to compete with the Cheneys and Romneys of the world. _**

Boy, after the last three months, I certainly understand the frustration. The Swamp stabbed President Trump in the back as quick as they could.

But I think we have a bigger opportunity. No Swamper has beaten a Trump-backed challenger in four years. Instead of starting a new party, let's just take over this one from the weak and feckless Swamp!

Trump is going to make the GOP his!

_A top political aide to former President Donald Trump spent the weekend quietly reassuring Republican senators that the former president has no plans to start a third party — and instead will keep his imprint on the GOP._

_The message from Brian Jack, Trump’s former political director at the White House, is the latest sign that** _Republicans considering an impeachment conviction will do so knowing that Trump may come after them in upcoming primaries_** if they vote to convict him for “incitement of insurrection.”_

_Jack did not mention impeachment in his calls. But he wanted the word to get around that _Trump is still a Republican — and for many, still the leader of his party.__

_“The president wanted me to know, as well as a handful of others, that the president is a Republican, he is not starting a third party and that anything he would do politically in the future would be as a Republican,” recounted Sen. Kevin Cramer (R-N.D.). “The Republican Party is still overwhelmingly supportive of this president.”_

[ ](https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=7RSOW&m=jAtxym4norcqI4c&b=WmlFxN3K6yv3tZ5kYcdqRQ)
---

McConnell was dumb to think he was going to get rid of Trump. More likely is we get rid of him- and the rest of his Swampy cronies. Anyone who builds a political career on Mitch, builds it on sand. We know who the RINOs are, and we are getting rid of them!

[ ](https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=7RSOW&m=jAtxym4norcqI4c&b=WmlFxN3K6yv3tZ5kYcdqRQ)
---

**President Trump never gave up. He never left us behind, and he's not leaving us a feckless GOP that won't fight. **

Trump is fighting to take control of the GOP- so we will join him!

We have to evict these treasonous Republicans and elect America First conservatives! Leaders like Lauren Boebert, Marjorie Taylor Greene, Ted Cruz, and the Freedom Caucus are what we need! [Let's fight back against the weak Republicans!](https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=7RSOW&m=jAtxym4norcqI4c&b=WmlFxN3K6yv3tZ5kYcdqRQ)

Drain the DC Swamp PAC is the anti-Lincoln Project. They surrender. We fight.

**We are joining Trump's fight to oust the RINOs who would rather play with the Far Left than fight them.[Help us fight for the Republic!](https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=7RSOW&m=jAtxym4norcqI4c&b=WmlFxN3K6yv3tZ5kYcdqRQ)**

_We will help reform the party into a vessel to fight for the American people. No more Cheneys, Bushes, McCains, or Romneys!_

We need the party to get up off the mat and fight! [Will you help us?](https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=7RSOW&m=jAtxym4norcqI4c&b=WmlFxN3K6yv3tZ5kYcdqRQ)

We are looking for good candidates to support as we speak. [Your $25, 50, 100, 250, 500, 1000 or more may go to help the next Freedom Caucus member](https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=7RSOW&m=jAtxym4norcqI4c&b=WmlFxN3K6yv3tZ5kYcdqRQ)- let's get them the firepower they need to beat the establishment!

The time for navel-gazing is over. [Help us push forward and fight for America](https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=7RSOW&m=jAtxym4norcqI4c&b=WmlFxN3K6yv3tZ5kYcdqRQ)!

Liz Cheney thinks she's "not going anywhere". Well, I beg to differ- we can send her packing and send a powerful message to the Swamp!

The days of one-sided loyalty came to a screeching halt with this second Fake Impeachment: NO LONGER will Conservatives give blind loyalty to any politician with an (R) after his name! We DEMAND loyalty by ALL Republicans to our President. Otherwise, GET OUT!

It’s time to use our Primary for what God intended: throwing out those that abuse our trust & good faith!

[Donate now.](https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=7RSOW&m=jAtxym4norcqI4c&b=WmlFxN3K6yv3tZ5kYcdqRQ)

Respectfully,
[ ](secure.anedot.com/draintheswamp/st1)
---
|
---

Christopher Ekstrom
Businessman
America First Donor

P.S. Socialists control Congress and God only knows what they will do. [Donate right now to help us fight for America.](https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=7RSOW&m=jAtxym4norcqI4c&b=WmlFxN3K6yv3tZ5kYcdqRQ)

5 Halifax Ct
Marlton NJ 08053
USA

[Unsubscribe](https://www.aweber.com/z/r/?rByszEzMnLTsbKysjMxsHLRGtCwc7EwsLIwM) [Change subscriber options](https://www.aweber.com/z/r/?rByszEzMnLTsbKysjMxsHLRGtCwc7EwsLIwM)
